crime.value: Multiple murders of young women/girls in a city
crime.quote: my daughter has been murdered... So far everyone who got murdered has been girls.

victim.value: Young women including Jessica Starlight and Hannah McCarther, but their 'killability' is unclear
victim.quote: Her name was Jessica... It turns out that her daughter had been murdered to.

closed_world.value: A city where Miranda operates her detective business
closed_world.quote: For many weeks there had been peace in the city

investigator.value: Miranda, a private detective who runs her own business
investigator.quote: I was just about to shut down my business when a lady came in with a supposedly "big problem".

red_herring.value: Little Jo-Jo appears as a suspicious child who claims to be lost but can't explain why she looked for Miranda on that specific street
red_herring.quote: Uhm..... because... I thought you might be here.

clue_fairness.value: The cloaked figure's warning and the living shadow are presented to the reader simultaneously with Miranda's experience
clue_fairness.quote: It was like a shadow but it was alive at the same time, then it just vanished.

social_world.value: Small-town community where mothers know each other and wave from porches, creating networks of observation and information
social_world.quote: When i passed bye Hannah's house I saw her mom standing out on the porch. I waved to her and she waved back

investigator_wound.value: Miranda's business was failing and she was about to shut down when the case arrived, making her financially dependent on solving it
investigator_wound.quote: I was just about to shut down my business when a lady came in with a supposedly "big problem".

_meta.title: ebook madison williams love peace and murder
